headline: Why Charles River (CRL) Is Up 5.8% After Divesting Units And Refreshing Its Leadership Team
summary: Recently, Charles River Laboratories International announced plans to sell its CDMO and Cell Solutions units along with certain European Discovery Services assets, while also naming Glenn G. Coleman as Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer and Kerry Dailey as Senior Vice President and Chief Legal Officer. Together, these portfolio changes and leadership appointments suggest the company is reshaping its business mix and governance to sharpen operational focus and...
